function.name: epoch_1d_check_converge_nx
function.description: Conduct a 1D EPOCH PIC simulation and evaluate its spatial convergence for nx task by multiplying nx by 1.2. It returns {"L2_error": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int}.

nx.description: Number of grid cells in x-direction
